name: Freezer Cucumber Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cucumbers, onions, salt and water in two large bowls.
2. Let stand at room temperature for 2 hours.
3. Add sugar and vinegar; stir until sugar dissolves.
4. Pack into 1-pint freezer containers, leaving 1-inch headspace.
5. Cover and freeze for up to 6 weeks.
6. Thaw at room temperature for 4 hours before serving.
